name: Android 18th

sheet.name: Android 18th
sheet.background_story:
Once a scholar dedicated to learning of the two is now under control of an ancient device. Programmed with only one vision. To continue to burn balds in the vein of ‘The Bald Burner’. 

Android 18 had eventually come into contact with Cirdan and was able to be subdued. Cirdan had information on an ancient device and codex to re program android 18 into being a devotee to the merchant and his shop. 

Cirdan has sent Android 18 to the stalwart fortress to mourn the infected King

description:
Once a scholar dedicated to learning of the two is now under control of an ancient device. Programmed with only one vision. To continue to burn balds in the vein of ‘The Bald Burner’. 

Android 18 had eventually come into contact with Cirdan and was able to be subdued. Cirdan had information on an ancient device and codex to re program android 18 into being a devotee to the merchant and his shop. 

Cirdan has sent Android 18 to the stalwart fortress to mourn the infected King
